title: Morbier Papillote with Argentinian Salsa
description:
A flavorful and healthy papillote dish featuring morbier cheese, 
   paired with a tangy Argentinian salsa.
instructions: Cut 4 pieces of parchment paper to size.
Place a slice of morbier cheese on each piece of paper.
Add a spoonful of argentinian chimichurri on top of the cheese.
Fold the paper over to create a papillote, and twist the top.
Place the papillotes on a baking sheet and bake for 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, chop the parsley and mince the garlic.
Squeeze a slice of lemon over the parsley.
Heat a teaspoon of olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the parsley mixture and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Remove the papillotes from the oven and serve with the parsley sauce.
Garnish with additional parsley if desired.
